sentence: 这一行为违反了国际法。
pinyin: Zhè yī xíngwéi wéifǎnle guójìfǎ.
english: This action violated international law.

sentence: 半导体行业竞争非常激烈。
pinyin: Bàndǎotǐ hángyè jìngzhēng fēicháng jīliè.
english: Competition in the semiconductor industry is fierce.

meaning: annotate; annotation; note; make notes in the margin
sentence: 老师让我们给这段文字加注释。
pinyin: Lǎoshī ràng wǒmen gěi zhè duàn wénzì jiā zhùshì.
english: The teacher asked us to add annotations to this passage.

sentence: 敌人在道路上布雷，十分危险。
pinyin: Dírén zài dàolù shang bùléi, shífēn wēixiǎn.
english: The enemy laid mines on the road, making it very dangerous.

meaning: 1. to serve in the army; 2. in active service
sentence: 他服役三年后退伍回家。
pinyin: Tā fúyì sān nián hòu tuìwǔ huíjiā.
english: He returned home after serving three years in the military.

meaning: 1. the ecliptic (the plane of the solar system)
sentence: 天文课介绍了黄道十二宫。
pinyin: Tiānwén kè jièshàole huángdào shí'èr gōng.
english: The astronomy class introduced the twelve signs of the ecliptic.

sentence: 城市需要不断完善基础设施。
pinyin: Chéngshì xūyào bùduàn wánshàn jīchǔ shèshī.
english: Cities need to continuously improve their infrastructure.

sentence: 他收到了老师的一封手书。
pinyin: Tā shōudàole lǎoshī de yī fēng shǒushū.
english: He received a handwritten letter from his teacher.

sentence: 分析师预测今年股市走势良好。
pinyin: Fēnxīshī yùcè jīnnián gǔshì zǒushì liánghǎo.
english: Analysts predict a positive stock market trend this year.

sentence: 学好数据结构对编程很有帮助。
pinyin: Xué hǎo shù jù jié gòu duì biān chéng hěn yǒu bāng zhù.
english: Mastering data structures is very helpful for programming.

meaning: to know all the ins and outs of sth; to get to know (a place) inside o
sentence: 用了两周，我就把这款软件玩转了。
pinyin: Yòng le liǎng zhōu, wǒ jiù bǎ zhè kuǎn ruǎn jiàn wán zhuǎn le.
english: After two weeks of use, I'd learned all the ins and outs of this software.

sentence: 最近油价上涨，开车成本增加了。
pinyin: Zuì jìn yóu jià shàng zhǎng, kāi chē chéng běn zēng jiā le.
english: Oil prices have risen recently, making driving more expensive.

sentence: 她每天早上都带狗狗去公园散步。
pinyin: Tā měi tiān zǎo shang dōu dài gǒu gǒu qù gōng yuán sàn bù.
english: She takes her dog to the park for a walk every morning.

sentence: 县长亲自到灾区察看情况。
pinyin: Xiàn zhǎng qīn zì dào zāi qū chá kàn qíng kuàng.
english: The county head personally went to the disaster area to assess the situation.

sentence: 老师发了一份课程大纲给我们。
pinyin: Lǎo shī fā le yī fèn kè chéng dà gāng gěi wǒ men.
english: The teacher handed out a course outline to us.

sentence: 爸爸查出有糖尿病，医生让他少吃甜食。
pinyin: Bàba chā chū yǒu tángniàobìng, yīshēng ràng tā shǎo chī tiánshí.
english: Dad was diagnosed with diabetes; the doctor told him to eat less sweets.

sentence: 周末我们去户外爬山放松一下吧。
pinyin: Zhōumò wǒmen qù hùwài páshān fàngsōng yīxià ba.
english: Let's go hiking outdoors this weekend to relax.

sentence: 她的妆容很精致，花了将近一个小时。
pinyin: Tā de zhuāngróng hěn jīngzhì, huā le jiāngjìn yī gè xiǎoshí.
english: Her makeup is very refined — it took her nearly an hour.

sentence: 农民每天早早起床去耕地。
pinyin: Nóng mín měi tiān zǎo zǎo qǐ chuáng qù gēng dì.
english: Farmers get up early every day to plow the fields.

meaning: Be particular about; fastidious; stress; exquisite ; careful study
sentence: 他吃东西很讲究，什么都要最新鲜的。
pinyin: Tā chī dōngxi hěn jiǎng jiū, shénme dōu yào zuì xīnxiān de.
english: He is very particular about food and wants everything to be the freshest.

sentence: 请依次排队，不要插队。
pinyin: Qǐng yī cì páiduì, bù yào chāduì.
english: Please queue up in order and don't cut in line.

meaning: 1. popular science; 2. popularization of science; 3. abbr. of 科學普及|科学普
sentence: 这个账号专门发科普类视频，很有意思。
pinyin: Zhège zhànghào zhuānmén fā kēpǔ lèi shìpín, hěn yǒu yìsi.
english: This account posts popular science videos specifically, and they're really interesting.

sentence: 附近有一座历史悠久的清真寺。
pinyin: Fùjìn yǒu yī zuò lìshǐ yōujiǔ de qīngzhēnsì.
english: There is a mosque with a long history nearby.

meaning: 1. to ride as a passenger; 2. to travel by (car, plane etc)
sentence: 我搭乘地铁去上班。
pinyin: Wǒ dāchéng dìtiě qù shàngbān.
english: I take the subway to work.

sentence: 他们两个总是甜蜜地牵着手走路。
pinyin: Tāmen liǎng gè zǒng shì tiánmì de qiān zhe shǒu zǒulù.
english: The two of them always walk hand in hand so sweetly.

meaning: 1. competition of skill (e.g. sports); 2. athletics tournament
sentence: 他从小就热爱竞技体育。
pinyin: Tā cóng xiǎo jiù rè'ài jìngjì tǐyù.
english: He has loved competitive athletics since he was a child.

sentence: 他的梦想是成为一名外交官。
pinyin: Tā de mèng xiǎng shì chéng wéi yī míng wài jiāo guān.
english: His dream is to become a diplomat.

sentence: 农民每天都要给鸡喂饲料。
pinyin: Nóngmín měi tiān dōu yào gěi jī wèi sìliào.
english: Farmers have to feed fodder to the chickens every day.

sentence: 每个公民都有纳税的义务。
pinyin: Měi gè gōng mín dōu yǒu nà shuì de yì wù.
english: Every citizen has the obligation to pay taxes.

meaning: 1. to fill in a form; 2. to write data in a box (on a questionnaire or
sentence: 请填写这张表格，然后交给前台。
pinyin: Qǐng tián xiě zhè zhāng biǎo gé, rán hòu jiāo gěi qián tái.
english: Please fill in this form and hand it to the front desk.

sentence: 他写了一封公开信说明情况。
pinyin: Tā xiě le yī fēng gōng kāi xìn shuō míng qíng kuàng.
english: He wrote an open letter to explain the situation.

meaning: (of a guard, sentry etc) to come off duty; (of a worker) be to laid of
sentence: 他下岗后开了一家小餐馆。
pinyin: Tā xià gǎng hòu kāi le yī jiā xiǎo cān guǎn.
english: After being laid off, he opened a small restaurant.

meaning: direction of a current; direction of flow; to flow toward
sentence: 这条河的流向是从北到南。
pinyin: Zhè tiáo hé de liúxiàng shì cóng běi dào nán.
english: This river flows from north to south.

sentence: 这位哲学家的思想影响了很多人。
pinyin: Zhè wèi zhéxuéjiā de sīxiǎng yǐngxiǎngle hěn duō rén.
english: This philosopher's ideas have influenced many people.

sentence: 我们每个人都应该重视环境保护。
pinyin: Wǒmen měi gè rén dōu yīnggāi zhòngshì huánjìng bǎohù.
english: Everyone should take environmental protection seriously.

sentence: 火星是太阳系的第四颗行星。
pinyin: Huǒxīng shì tàiyánɡxì de dì sì kē xíngxīng.
english: Mars is the fourth planet in the solar system.

sentence: 走廊里的灯光非常明亮。
pinyin: Zǒuláng lǐ de dēngguāng fēicháng míngliàng.
english: The lights in the hallway are very bright.

sentence: 鸦片战争是中国近代史的重要事件。
pinyin: Yāpiàn zhànzhēng shì Zhōngguó jìndàishǐ de zhòngyào shìjiàn.
english: The Opium War is an important event in modern Chinese history.

sentence: 去年的失业率有所下降。
pinyin: Qùnián de shīyèlǜ yǒusuǒ xiàjiàng.
english: The unemployment rate dropped somewhat last year.

sentence: 示威者聚集在广场上表达诉求。
pinyin: Shìwēizhě jùjí zài guǎngchǎng shang biǎodá sùqiú.
english: Protesters gathered in the square to voice their demands.

sentence: 这本文集收录了他的代表作。
pinyin: Zhè běn wénjí shōulùle tā de dàibiǎozuò.
english: This collection includes his representative works.

sentence: 孩子们万圣节装扮成吸血鬼。
pinyin: Háizimen wànshèngjié zhuāngbàn chéng xīxuèguǐ.
english: The kids dressed up as vampires for Halloween.

sentence: 科学家发现了一种新型粒子。
pinyin: Kēxuéjiā fāxiànle yī zhǒng xīnxíng lìzǐ.
english: Scientists discovered a new type of particle.

meaning: 1. holy land (of a religion); 2. sacred place; 3. shrine; 4. holy city
sentence: 很多信徒一生希望去一次圣地。
pinyin: Hěn duō xìntú yīshēng xīwàng qù yī cì shèngdì.
english: Many believers hope to visit the holy land at least once in their lifetime.

sentence: 国防部长出席了今天的会议。
pinyin: Guófáng bùzhǎng chūxíle jīntiān de huìyì.
english: The defense minister attended today's meeting.

sentence: 他不在乎世俗的眼光，活得很自在。
pinyin: Tā bù zàihu shìsú de yǎnguāng, huó de hěn zìzài.
english: He doesn't care about worldly opinions and lives very freely.

sentence: 沿这条路向南走十分钟就到了。
pinyin: Yán zhè tiáo lù xiàng nán zǒu shí fēnzhōng jiù dào le.
english: Walk southward along this road for ten minutes and you'll be there.

sentence: 不应该因为肤色而歧视别人。
pinyin: Bù yīnggāi yīnwèi fūsè ér qíshì biérén.
english: One should not discriminate against others because of skin color.

sentence: 我打电话给客服，反映了问题。
pinyin: Wǒ dǎ diànhuà gěi kèfú, fǎnyìngle wèntí.
english: I called customer service to report the issue.

meaning: 1. more serious case; 2. in extreme cases
sentence: 轻者罚款，重者将被吊销执照。
pinyin: Qīng zhě fákuǎn, zhòng zhě jiāng bèi diàoxiāo zhízhào.
english: Minor cases result in a fine; in extreme cases, the license will be revoked.
